title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.798 - Rulemaking authority, board of curators
text:
172.798.  Rulemaking authority, board of curators. — The board of curators shall administer all provisions of sections 172.790 to 172.798 and may promulgate rules and regulations necessary to carry out this duty.
(L. 2001 H.B. 218)
